# aitokenweight

> Turn today's AI token usage into a shareable energy-equivalence poster.

## For AI agents

- [agent.md](./agent.md): instructions — collect the user's exact token usage, dynamically invent fresh poster copy plus three energy comparisons, and fill the page via `/?poster=1&data=<base64url DailyTokenUsage>`.
- [Skill manifest](./.well-known/skills/daily-token-poster.skill.json)
- [Agent descriptions](./.well-known/agent-descriptions)
